content.full_text:
August 10, 1992

Legal Division
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Re: Request for Informal Assistance

Greetings:

I am soliciting your opinion on behalf of myself regarding the issues stated in this letter.

From time to time, I have been offered tickets to baseball games from private concerns under conditions which would normally trigger a reporting requirement. It has been my practice, when accepting such tickets, to pay to the donor the face value of the tickets.

It has been my impression that if I pay the donor for the tickets that they no longer constitute a gift, and therefore no reporting requirements exists. I would like your opinion on whether this perception is correct. Thank you.

Very truly yours,

William R. Galstan
City Attorney
